name: Nine-Square Sheep Management
mvpBehaviour: Nine numbered cells. User clicks or types a number. Dog uses X or O.
stateRule: Game moves do not increment conversation count.
constraints: Puppy, Working Dog and Einstein difficulty can be added later.

name: Missing Sheep
mvpBehaviour: Three to five letter dog-related words. Wrong guesses reduce sheep remaining.
stateRule: All accepted words come from an approved database.
constraints: Avoid hanging imagery. Use sheep or gates as the visual counter.
whySelected: Family safe and simple to maintain.

name: Kennel Sketch Recognition
mvpBehaviour: Show one of ten fixed monospaced dog-themed drawings and accept approved synonyms.
stateRule: Black text on white. Preserve spaces and line breaks.
constraints: Thumbs up or down response. One or two guesses.
whySelected: Very light build and strongly suited to the chat format.

name: Six-Post Flock Separation
mvpBehaviour: Six points in a hexagon. Players draw lines and avoid creating their own triangle.
stateRule: Requires line selection, colour state and triangle detection.

name: Kennel-to-Kennel Word Herding
mvpBehaviour: Change one letter at a time using a small approved solution set.
stateRule: Do not use an unrestricted dictionary in MVP.
whySelected: Good fit but more validation logic.
